backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the java.version property.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not enforce the target bytecode version correctly, leading to potential runtime incompatibilities or failure to compile against Java 21 APIs if the default source/target levels are not aligned.
